Description: When the document was inserted into the wazuh-active-responses index.
Document ID of the matched alert that triggered the active response.
Source index of the matched alert that triggered the active response.
Agent configured in the active response channel.
Executable configured in the active response channel.
Arguments configured in the active response channel.
Where to execute. One of: local, defined-agent, all.
Name of the active response configured in the channel.
Seconds configured in the channel (for stateful type).
Response type. One of: stateless, stateful.
